name: exportTrace
_note: Persists a client-held reasoning trace into the caller's per-user export ledger (globalThis._concordSTATE.cognitionLens, keyed by actor.userId). Empty/non-object trace fails-closed with 'trace_required'. The returned export metadata strips the heavy trace body (trace: undefined). The macro-assassin's internal owner actor writes into its own bucket → ok:true; never no_db (memory-backed).
